message:
fix(wal): simplify WAL checksum accumulation to single-pass x0/x1 update

Collapse the two-step s1/s2 update loop in sqlite_wal_checksum into a
single pass per 8-byte chunk pair. Previously x0 and x1 were processed
in two separate rounds with intermediate s2 feedback; the simplified
form processes x0 into s1 and x1 into s2 in one step, reducing the
wrapping_add chain from 6 operations to 4 per chunk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
